# Blake, Nosko, Tadelis - eBay paid search field experiment

## URL

https://faculty.haas.berkeley.edu/stadelis/BNT_ECMA_rev.pdf

## Core point

Large-scale eBay experiments showed non-experimental paid-search attribution can overstate returns because search clicks correlate with purchase intent.

## Use inside this pack

Use as warning against branded-search and last-click illusions.

## Agent instruction

When this source applies, convert it into an executable campaign or measurement artifact. Do not merely cite it.

## Reliability note

Classify this source as official platform/regulator/academic depending on the source. Prefer direct platform documentation for platform behavior and academic/field-experiment sources for measurement discipline.
